title: Aeridostachya bancana
taxonomy: Aeridostachya bancana is classified as a species of orchid native to Indonesia. It belongs to the genus Aeridostachya. The exact classification of this species within the orchid family is as follows: Aeridostachya bancana is part of the subfamily Epidendroideae, and further classified as part of the tribe Vandeae. This classification places Aeridostachya bancana within the family Orchidaceae. The full classification is Aeridostachya bancana, subfamily Epidendroideae, tribe Vandeae, family Orchidaceae.
